description: After Claude responds, a background step should detect refusal/capability-gap patterns in the response (e.g. 'I don't have access', 'I cannot', 'I'm unable to'). When detected, enqueue an inbox_write job with a structured description of the missing capability (original ask + response snippet). Also publish an SSE 'token' event to the user saying a feature request was submitted.
title: Capability-gap detection: detect refusals and file feature inbox item

description: When user asks 'show me open feature requests' or similar, the classifier routes to a new job type that reads inbox items tagged as feature_request category, formats them with original ask + Syl response snippet as context, and streams the list back via SSE. This enables Claude to inspect its own capability gaps and work through them with the user.
title: Inbox-driven feature development: list open feature requests
